title: Better inference of the ICE40 SB_MUL16 blocks

features.name: unsigned_multiplication_16bit_wide_vectors
features.description: Code should include an unsigned multiplication between two 16-bit wide vectors where the result is a 32-bit wire

features.name: signed_multiplication_16bit_wide_vectors
features.description: Code should include signed multiplication between two 16-bit wide vectors where both operands are explicitly cast to signed and the result is a 34-bit wire

features.name: multiple_multiplication_operations_in_sequence
features.description: Code should include multiple multiplication operations (4 or more) on similar width vectors within the same module scope
